title: Rocket Lab Corp (RKLB) Q3 2025 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue Growth and Strategic Expansion
text: Rocket Lab reported impressive third-quarter 2025 financial results, achieving record-breaking performance with revenue climbing to $155 million, representing a 48% year-over-year surge. The space systems division contributed $114.2 million in quarterly sales, growing 16.7% sequentially, while launch services generated $40.9 million. The company demonstrated strong margin performance with GAAP gross margins at 37% (within guidance) and non-GAAP gross margins reaching 41.9%, exceeding expectations. However, operating expenses surpassed projections due to neutron rocket development and staffing increases. Rocket Lab maintains substantial financial flexibility with over $1 billion in cash and marketable securities. The firm reported a $0.03 per-share GAAP loss, improving from the prior quarter's $0.13 loss, though cash consumption remained elevated. Management highlighted 49 contracted launches and approximately $1.1 billion in backlog as evidence of robust market demand. The company successfully executed 16 missions this year, matching the prior-year record. Looking ahead, the company projects Q4 revenue between $170-$180 million, reflecting continued momentum in both launch services and satellite manufacturing operations.
